title: New Part Request
description: Tell us what part you need and where it goes.

brand.title: Select Vehicle Brand
brand.description: Choose your vehicle's manufacturer for accurate part matching.

category.title: Select Category
category.description: Pick the category that best fits the part you need.

part_details.title: Part Details
part_details.description: Describe the part you're looking for in detail.

vehicle_info.title: Vehicle Info
vehicle_info.description: Enter your vehicle's model and year for compatibility.
vehicle_info.why_description: Accurate vehicle details help sellers find the right part faster and avoid mismatches.

photos.title: Photos & Media
photos.description: Upload photos to help sellers identify the correct part.
photos.dropzone_hint: Drag images here or click to browse

success.updated_desc: Your request has been updated successfully.
success.created_desc: Your part request has been published successfully. Sellers will now be able to view and respond to your request.
success.submitted_desc: Your part request has been published successfully. Sellers will now be able to view and respond to your request.

header.title: New Request
header.edit_desc: Update the details of your part request.

placeholders.description: Include any specific requirements, OEM numbers, or condition preferences.

hints.category: Choose the closest match so the right sellers see your request.
hints.category_tip: Correct categorization helps you get matched up to 40% faster.
hints.vehicle_tip: Accurate vehicle specs let sellers verify compatibility instantly.
hints.photos: Photos of the damaged or needed part help sellers give you precise quotes.
hints.photos_empty: Files are encrypted for your privacy.
hints.status: "Publish" sends your request to verified sellers who can then respond with quotes.
hints.guidelines1: Clear photos make it easier for sellers to identify the correct part.
hints.guidelines2: Mention if you need OEM, aftermarket, new, or used parts.
hints.media_speed: Good photos mean faster, more accurate quotes.
hints.browse_drop: Tap to browse or drag photos here
hints.vin_help: The VIN is a unique 17-character code. Find it on your registration card or at the base of the windshield.
hints.description_help: Specify the variant, engine type, or whether you need original (OEM) or aftermarket parts.

dialogs.edit_description: Update the details to help sellers provide better quotes.

toasts.login_required: Please sign in to create or edit a request
toasts.process_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
